fsm_model.description: Complete state machine modeling device commissioning flows (Standard, User-Intent, Custom) and Enhanced Setup Flow including Terms & Conditions handling. Covers all scenarios: transient/systematic failure handling with retry/fallback, background scanning during custom flows, offline commissioning, passcode=0 hint handling, already-on-IP commissioning, fallback URL parameter expansion, and TC maintenance URL redirects.

states.name: FactoryNew_Standard
states.description: Device in factory-new state, Standard Commissioning Flow type, not yet powered on

states.name: FactoryNew_UserIntent
states.description: Device in factory-new state, User-Intent Commissioning Flow type, not yet powered on

states.name: FactoryNew_Custom
states.description: Device in factory-new state, Custom Commissioning Flow type, requires manufacturer setup

states.name: Advertising_Standard
states.description: Standard Flow device automatically advertising after power-on

states.name: WaitingForUserIntent
states.description: User-Intent Flow device powered on but waiting for explicit user interaction signal

states.name: Advertising_UserIntent
states.description: User-Intent Flow device advertising after user intent signal received

states.name: WaitingForManufacturerSetup_Custom
states.description: Custom Flow device waiting for manufacturer-guided setup steps completion

states.name: Advertising_Custom
states.description: Custom Flow device advertising after manufacturer setup completed

states.name: AdvertisingExpired
states.description: Device stopped advertising after timeout, requires re-triggering per flow type

states.name: Commissionable
states.description: Device in commissionable state, ready for secure channel establishment via pairing code

states.name: Commissioned
states.description: Device successfully commissioned, operational in fabric

states.name: TC_Update_Available
states.description: Device has updated Terms & Conditions available, TCAcknowledgementsRequired set to True

states.name: Limited_Functionality
states.description: Device operating with limited functionality until TC acknowledgements received

states.name: Commissioner_Idle
states.description: Commissioner idle, no commissioning in progress

states.name: Commissioner_ReadingPayload
states.description: Commissioner reading onboarding payload from QR code or manual pairing code

states.name: Commissioner_CheckingDCL
states.description: Commissioner retrieving DCL information for VID/PID

states.name: Commissioner_FollowingStandardFlow
states.description: Commissioner executing Standard Commissioning Flow procedures

states.name: Commissioner_FollowingUserIntentFlow
states.description: Commissioner guiding user through User-Intent Flow instructions

states.name: Commissioner_CheckingESF
states.description: Commissioner checking if Enhanced Setup Flow supported and required

states.name: Commissioner_FollowingCustomFlow
states.description: Commissioner redirecting user to manufacturer Custom Flow URL

states.name: Commissioner_RetrievingESF_TC
states.description: Commissioner retrieving and validating Enhanced Setup Flow Terms & Conditions file

states.name: Commissioner_PresentingTC
states.description: Commissioner presenting Terms & Conditions to user for acknowledgement

states.name: Commissioner_WaitingForCallback
states.description: Commissioner waiting for manufacturer custom flow callback with returned payload

states.name: Commissioner_CommissioningDevice
states.description: Commissioner establishing secure channel and commissioning device

states.name: Commissioner_CommissioningFailed
states.description: Commissioning failed, commissioner directing user to fallback mechanisms

states.name: Commissioner_CommissioningSucceeded
states.description: Commissioning completed successfully

states.name: Commissioner_ScanningInBackground
states.description: Commissioner scanning for device while custom flow or fallback in progress

states.name: Commissioner_ExpandingFallbackUrl
states.description: Commissioner expanding CommissioningFallbackUrl with parameters (MTop/MTcu)

states.name: Commissioner_Offline
states.description: Commissioner operating in offline mode without internet access

states.name: Administrator_Idle
states.description: Administrator managing commissioned devices, monitoring for TC updates

states.name: Administrator_TC_UpdateDetected
states.description: Administrator detected TC update required notification from device

states.name: Administrator_PresentingUpdatedTC
states.description: Administrator presenting updated Terms & Conditions to user

transitions.description: Standard Flow device automatically starts advertising upon power-on from factory state
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.1: SHALL start advertising automatically upon power on

transitions.description: User-Intent Flow device powers on but does NOT automatically advertise
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.2: SHALL NOT start advertising automatically upon application of power

transitions.description: User-Intent device transitions to advertising after explicit user interaction beyond power-on
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.2: user interaction with the device beyond application of power is required

transitions.description: Custom Flow device powers on and waits for manufacturer-guided setup
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3: SHALL require interaction with custom steps guided by manufacturer

transitions.description: Custom Flow device becomes available for commissioning after manufacturer setup
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3: before it can be commissioned by any Matter commissioner

transitions.description: Standard Flow device stops advertising after timeout period expires
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.1: device has stopped advertising (e.g. user has powered on the device longer ago than the advertisement period)

transitions.description: User-Intent Flow device stops advertising after timeout
transitions.spec_ref: Implicit from advertising timeout mechanism

transitions.description: Custom Flow device stops advertising after timeout
transitions.spec_ref: Implicit from advertising timeout mechanism

transitions.description: Standard Flow device re-enters advertising via power cycle (bit 0 of CommissioningModeInitialStepsHint)
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.1 Table 78: bit 0 (Power Cycle) being set to 1

transitions.description: User-Intent Flow device re-enters advertising via user intent signal (NOT power cycle)
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.2: Bit 0 (Power Cycle) SHALL be set to 0

transitions.description: Custom Flow device re-enters advertising via manufacturer-defined mechanism
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3: manufacturer-provided means for resuming

transitions.description: Device transitions to commissionable state when discovered by commissioner
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7: device available for commissioning

transitions.description: User-Intent device transitions to commissionable when discovered
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.2: SHALL be available for initial commissioning

transitions.guard: advertising == true && has_valid_pairing_code == true && manufacturer_setup_complete == true
transitions.description: Custom Flow device transitions to commissionable after manufacturer setup and discovery
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3: available for commissioning by any commissioner

transitions.description: Device successfully commissioned and joins fabric
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7: successful commissioning completion

transitions.description: Device signals updated Terms & Conditions available
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.6: device MAY update TCMinRequiredVersion and set TCAcknowledgementsRequired to True

transitions.description: Device limits functionality when TC update deadline passes without acknowledgement
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.6: device MAY operate with limited functionality

transitions.description: Device returns to normal operation after TC acknowledgement
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.6: device SHALL operate with the functionality of the related features

transitions.description: Device restores full functionality after TC acknowledgement
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.6: Upon satisfactory acceptance, device SHALL operate with full functionality

transitions.description: User initiates commissioning process
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7: commissioning flow initiation

transitions.description: Commissioner extracts VID/PID and flow type from onboarding payload
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7: Onboarding Payload reading

transitions.description: Commissioner identifies Standard Commissioning Flow
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.1: Custom Flow bits indicate '0 - Standard Flow'

transitions.description: Commissioner identifies User-Intent Commissioning Flow
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.2: Custom Flow bits '1 - User Intent'

transitions.description: Commissioner identifies Custom Commissioning Flow, checks ESF support
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3: Custom Flow bits '2 - Custom'

transitions.description: Standard Flow: device discovered, proceed to commissioning
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.1: Standard Flow direct commissioning

transitions.description: User-Intent Flow: device discovered after user interaction
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.2: commissioning after user intent signal

transitions.guard: supports_esf == true && device_esf_required == true && commissioner_supports_esf_options == true
transitions.description: Commissioner supports ESF, proceeding with Enhanced Setup Flow instead of Custom Flow URL
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3: commissioner SHOULD perform ESF rather than following CommissioningCustomFlowUrl

transitions.description: Commissioner does not support ESF or ESF not applicable, following Custom Flow URL
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3: SHOULD use CommissioningCustomFlowUrl unless ESF supported

transitions.description: Commissioner redirected user to manufacturer URL, waiting for callback
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3.2: Commissioner MAY provide CallbackUrl

transitions.description: Commissioner redirected user without callback, user must manually restart commissioning
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3: User might have to perform trigger to return to commissioner

transitions.description: Manufacturer custom flow returned with valid payload, proceeding to commissioning
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3.2.1: CustomFlow field needs to be 0 for return payload

transitions.description: Custom flow callback timeout, commissioning failed
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5: commissioning failure handling

transitions.guard: esf_file_found == true && digest_valid == true && filesize_valid == true && format_valid == true
transitions.description: ESF TC file successfully validated, proceeding to present TC
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.1: SHALL validate using EnhancedSetupFlowTCDigest, TCFileSize, and TC File Format

transitions.guard: esf_file_found == false || digest_valid == false || filesize_valid == false || format_valid == false
transitions.description: ESF file validation failed, falling back to Custom Commissioning Flow
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.1: When ESF file not found or validation fails, SHALL proceed using Custom Commissioning Flow

transitions.description: User accepted all required TC, proceeding to commissioning
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.1: user accepts required terms

transitions.description: User declined required TC, commissioning terminated
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.1: SHALL end commissioning and notify user device cannot be commissioned

transitions.description: Commissioning completed successfully
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7: successful commissioning

transitions.description: Commissioning failed during secure channel or device setup
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5: commissioning failure cases

transitions.description: Commissioner directs user to CommissioningFallbackUrl for resolution
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5.2: SHALL use CommissioningFallbackUrl to guide user

transitions.description: Commissioner informs user of failure reason when fallback URL unavailable or impossible
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5.2: SHOULD inform user of assumed reason for commissioning failure

transitions.description: Standard Flow: device not discovered within timeout
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5: commissioning failure - device not found

transitions.description: User-Intent Flow: user did not provide intent signal within timeout
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5: commissioning failure handling

transitions.description: Administrator detects TC update notification from device
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.6: Administrator SHOULD subscribe to TCAcknowledgementsRequired

transitions.description: Administrator retrieved and validated updated TC file
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.6: Administrator SHOULD present updated TC

transitions.description: Administrator propagates updated TC acknowledgements to device(s)
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.6: SHALL propagate with SetTCAcknowledgements, MAY set to all applicable devices

transitions.description: User declined updated TC, device may continue with limited functionality
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.6: device MAY operate with limited functionality

transitions.description: Device returns TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS_CHANGED status for restricted interactions
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.6: SHALL return TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS_CHANGED failure status code

transitions.description: Device in limited functionality returns error status for restricted interactions
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.6: interactions which cannot succeed SHALL return status code

transitions.description: Commissioner retries commissioning after transient failure
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5.2: Commissioner MAY try again when failure is transient

transitions.description: Commissioner begins background scanning while custom flow progresses
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3.4: Commissioner MAY continue to scan for announcements in background

transitions.description: Commissioner begins background scanning while waiting for callback
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3.4: Commissioner MAY continue to scan in background

transitions.description: Device discovered during background scan, proceeding directly to commissioning
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3.4: background scan finds device ready for commissioning

transitions.description: Commissioner detects passcode=0 hint and avoids commission attempt
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3.1: Passcode MAY be set to 0 to allow Commissioner to avoid attempting to commission

transitions.description: Commissioner prepares to expand fallback URL with MTop/MTcu parameters
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5.3: CommissioningFallbackUrl MAY use MTop, MTcu, MTrop parameters

transitions.description: Commissioner redirects to expanded fallback URL with parameters
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5.3: Fallback URL expanded similar to custom flow URL

transitions.description: Commissioner detects offline mode, cannot retrieve DCL
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5.2: lack of internet access prevents URL usage

transitions.description: Offline commissioning fails for devices requiring custom/ESF flows
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5.2: Commissioner SHOULD inform user of failure reason when offline

transitions.description: Offline commissioning proceeds for Standard/User-Intent flows
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5.2: Offline mode commissioning possible for some flows

transitions.description: Manufacturer custom flow failed and did not provide MTrop payload
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3.2.1: If failed to make device commissionable, SHALL NOT replace MTrop placeholder

transitions.description: Administrator redirects user to EnhancedSetupFlowMaintenanceUrl for issue resolution
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.4.6: Administrator encountering TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS_CHANGED SHOULD direct to MaintenanceUrl

transitions.description: Device already on IP network, commissioning directly without BLE discovery
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.5: commissioning while already on IP-network

transitions.description: Background scan times out, returning to idle to await user action
transitions.spec_ref: 5.7.3.4: Background scan is opportunistic, commissioner still needs user trigger

functions.name: set_flow_type
functions.description: Sets the commissioning flow type for the device (STANDARD, USER_INTENT, or CUSTOM)
functions.behavior: Assigns flow_type attribute to device configuration

functions.name: set_custom_flow_bits
functions.description: Sets Custom Flow bits in Onboarding Payload: 0=Standard, 1=User Intent, 2=Custom
functions.behavior: Encodes flow type in onboarding payload according to spec

functions.name: start_advertising
functions.description: Device begins broadcasting commissioning advertisements
functions.behavior: Activates BLE/WiFi advertisements with commissioning service data

functions.name: stop_advertising
functions.description: Device stops broadcasting commissioning advertisements
functions.behavior: Deactivates advertisements to save power and close commissioning window

functions.name: start_timer
functions.description: Starts a countdown timer with specified ID and duration
functions.behavior: Creates timer that will trigger timer_expiry event when duration elapses. Typical duration: 15 minutes for advertisement timeout

functions.name: timer_expired
functions.description: Checks if specified timer has expired
functions.behavior: Returns true if timer duration elapsed, false otherwise

functions.name: set_awaiting_user_intent
functions.description: Sets flag indicating device is waiting for explicit user intent signal
functions.behavior: Used in User-Intent Flow to track waiting state

functions.name: set_manufacturer_setup_complete
functions.description: Marks custom flow manufacturer-guided setup as complete or incomplete
functions.behavior: Custom Flow devices use this to gate advertising availability

functions.name: set_commissioned
functions.description: Sets device commissioned status
functions.behavior: Marks device as successfully commissioned into fabric

functions.name: join_fabric
functions.description: Device joins Matter fabric with provided credentials
functions.behavior: Establishes fabric membership using commissioning-provided credentials

functions.name: set_TCAcknowledgementsRequired
functions.description: Sets TCAcknowledgementsRequired attribute indicating TC update needs user acknowledgement
functions.behavior: Attribute visible to administrators for TC update detection

functions.name: increment_TCMinRequiredVersion
functions.description: Increments TCMinRequiredVersion to indicate new TC revision available
functions.behavior: Increments version number to signal TC update to administrators

functions.name: limit_functionality
functions.description: Device limits functionality until TC acknowledgements received
functions.behavior: Restricts certain operations, returns TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS_CHANGED status for blocked interactions

functions.name: restore_functionality
functions.description: Device restores full functionality after TC acknowledgement
functions.behavior: Removes restrictions, resumes normal operation

functions.name: set_TCAcceptedVersion
functions.description: Records the TC version that user accepted
functions.behavior: Stores accepted TC version for future reference

functions.name: received_SetTCAcknowledgements
functions.description: Checks if SetTCAcknowledgements command received from administrator
functions.behavior: Returns true if administrator sent TC acknowledgement command

functions.name: return_status
functions.description: Returns specified status code for interaction request
functions.behavior: Sends status code response to requesting node

functions.name: retrieve_dcl_info
functions.description: Commissioner retrieves DCL entry for specified VID/PID
functions.behavior: Queries Distributed Compliance Ledger for device metadata including CommissioningCustomFlow, URLs, hints, ESF info

functions.name: scan_for_device
functions.description: Commissioner scans network for advertising device
functions.behavior: Performs BLE/WiFi scan looking for commissioning advertisements

functions.name: display_user_intent_instructions
functions.description: Commissioner displays instructions from CommissioningModeInitialStepsHint to guide user
functions.behavior: Shows user how to trigger user intent signal (e.g., press button, follow manual)

functions.name: expand_custom_flow_url
functions.description: Commissioner expands CommissioningCustomFlowUrl by substituting placeholders
functions.behavior: Replaces MTcu with CallbackUrl (URL-encoded), MTop with onboarding payload (URL-encoded), per RFC 3986

functions.name: redirect_to_url
functions.description: Commissioner redirects user to specified URL (opens browser or app)
functions.behavior: Launches URL in system browser or appropriate handler

functions.name: retrieve_esf_tc_file
functions.description: Commissioner retrieves ESF TC file from EnhancedSetupFlowTCUrl
functions.behavior: Downloads JSON file containing Terms & Conditions texts from HTTPS URL

functions.name: validate_esf_file
functions.description: Commissioner validates ESF file using digest, filesize, and format checks
functions.behavior: Verifies EnhancedSetupFlowTCDigest matches file hash, filesize matches EnhancedSetupFlowTCFileSize, JSON schema valid, UTF-8 encoding

functions.name: present_tc_with_primary_focus
functions.description: Commissioner presents TC to user with primary focus, text not hidden/obscured
functions.behavior: Displays TC in dedicated UI with accept/decline options per text, renders restricted HTML subset safely

functions.name: check_tc_cache
functions.description: Commissioner checks if TC responses cached and reusable per ESF option bits
functions.behavior: Examines cache for matching VID, PID (if bit 3 unset), TC digest/revision, validates reuse rules per bits 1-3

functions.name: record_tc_responses
functions.description: Commissioner records user's TC acceptance/declination responses
functions.behavior: Stores responses mapped to ordinal bits for TCAcknowledgements bitmap

functions.name: cache_tc_if_allowed
functions.description: Commissioner caches TC responses if ESF option bits allow reuse
functions.behavior: Stores cached responses with VID, PID, TC digest, TC revision, encrypted and integrity-protected

functions.name: end_commissioning
functions.description: Commissioner terminates commissioning process
functions.behavior: Cleans up state, closes connections, returns to idle

functions.name: notify_user_refusal
functions.description: Commissioner notifies user device cannot be commissioned due to TC refusal
functions.behavior: Displays message explaining required TC was declined

functions.name: extract_pairing_code
functions.description: Commissioner extracts pairing code from onboarding payload or user input
functions.behavior: Retrieves passcode for secure channel establishment proof-of-possession

functions.name: establish_secure_channel
functions.description: Commissioner establishes secure channel with device using pairing code
functions.behavior: Performs PAKE-based secure channel establishment per Matter spec, returns true if successful

functions.name: commission_device
functions.description: Commissioner performs device commissioning over secure channel
functions.behavior: Provisions NOC, ACLs, network credentials, completes commissioning sequence

functions.name: notify_success
functions.description: Commissioner notifies user of successful commissioning
functions.behavior: Displays success message, device name, fabric info

functions.name: complete_commissioning
functions.description: Commissioner finalizes commissioning process
functions.behavior: Commits fabric state, saves device info, closes commissioning session

functions.name: determine_failure_type
functions.description: Commissioner analyzes commissioning failure to categorize as transient or systematic
functions.behavior: Returns TRANSIENT (network glitch, timeout) or SYSTEMATIC (capability mismatch, invalid credentials)

functions.name: display_fallback_url
functions.description: Commissioner displays CommissioningFallbackUrl to guide user to manufacturer resolution
functions.behavior: Shows URL with context about failure, may expand URL with MTop/MTcu parameters

functions.name: redirect_to_fallback
functions.description: Commissioner redirects user to fallback URL in browser/app
functions.behavior: Launches fallback URL for manufacturer-guided troubleshooting

functions.name: inform_user_of_failure_reason
functions.description: Commissioner informs user of assumed commissioning failure reason
functions.behavior: Displays error message with probable cause and suggestions (used when fallback URL unavailable)

functions.name: subscribe_to_TCAcknowledgementsRequired
functions.description: Administrator subscribes to device TCAcknowledgementsRequired attribute for TC update notifications
functions.behavior: Establishes subscription to receive attribute change reports

functions.name: retrieve_TCMinRequiredVersion
functions.description: Administrator retrieves current TCMinRequiredVersion from device
functions.behavior: Reads attribute to determine required TC version

functions.name: parse_updated_tc
functions.description: Administrator parses retrieved updated TC file
functions.behavior: Extracts TC texts, ordinals, required flags from JSON for presentation

functions.name: send_SetTCAcknowledgements
functions.description: Administrator sends SetTCAcknowledgements command with user responses
functions.behavior: Transmits TCAcknowledgements bitmap and TCAcceptedVersion to device

functions.name: propagate_to_applicable_devices
functions.description: Administrator propagates TC acknowledgements to all applicable devices per reuse rules
functions.behavior: Sends SetTCAcknowledgements to devices matching VID, PID (if allowed), TC digest/revision where reuse permitted

functions.name: extract_VID_PID
functions.description: Commissioner extracts VendorID and ProductID from onboarding payload
functions.behavior: Parses VID/PID fields from QR code or manual pairing code

functions.name: extract_custom_flow_bits
functions.description: Commissioner extracts Custom Flow bits from onboarding payload
functions.behavior: Reads flow type indicator: 0=Standard, 1=User Intent, 2=Custom

functions.name: retrieve_initial_steps_hint
functions.description: Commissioner retrieves CommissioningModeInitialStepsHint from DCL
functions.behavior: Gets bitmap indicating pairing instructions (power cycle, button press, etc.)

functions.name: check_esf_support
functions.description: Commissioner checks if device requires ESF and commissioner supports required ESF options
functions.behavior: Reads EnhancedSetupFlowOptions from payload/DCL, checks commissioner capabilities

functions.name: retrieve_custom_flow_url
functions.description: Commissioner retrieves CommissioningCustomFlowUrl from DCL
functions.behavior: Gets manufacturer URL for custom flow guidance

functions.name: retrieve_esf_tc_url
functions.description: Commissioner retrieves EnhancedSetupFlowTCUrl from DCL
functions.behavior: Gets URL to download Terms & Conditions JSON file

functions.name: wait_for_callback
functions.description: Commissioner enters waiting state for manufacturer custom flow callback
functions.behavior: Listens for callback URL opening with MTrop parameter

functions.name: extract_returned_payload
functions.description: Commissioner extracts onboarding payload from MTrop parameter in callback URL
functions.behavior: URL-decodes and parses returned payload from manufacturer flow

functions.name: verify_custom_flow_bits_zero
functions.description: Commissioner verifies returned payload has Custom Flow bits set to 0 (not 2)
functions.behavior: Checks returned payload indicates Standard Flow, not Custom Flow, to prevent redirect loop

functions.name: parse_tc_texts
functions.description: Commissioner parses TC texts from ESF file for user's locale
functions.behavior: Selects locale using BCP47 tag (user language + device country), falls back to defaults, extracts texts with ordinals/required flags

functions.name: log_declination
functions.description: Administrator logs user's declination of updated TC
functions.behavior: Records declination for audit purposes, device may continue with limited functionality

functions.name: validate_https_scheme
functions.description: Validates URL uses HTTPS scheme, not HTTP
functions.behavior: Checks URL starts with https://, returns false for http:// or other schemes. Per spec examples, http:// is invalid

functions.name: validate_mt_reserved_keys
functions.description: Validates no unreferenced MT-prefixed keys present in URL query
functions.behavior: Returns false if query contains MT-prefixed keys other than MTcu, MTop, MTrop which are reserved for future spec use

functions.name: preserve_query_order
functions.description: Ensures query parameter order is preserved during URL manipulation
functions.behavior: Maintains original order of key/value pairs as obtained from DCL per spec requirement

functions.name: preserve_fragment
functions.description: Ensures URL fragment is preserved during expansion
functions.behavior: Fragment field SHALL remain as obtained from DCL

functions.name: validate_esf_schema_version
functions.description: Validates ESF file schemaVersion is compatible with commissioner
functions.behavior: Checks if commissioner can handle the schema version, returns false if version too new/incompatible

functions.name: check_passcode_zero
functions.description: Checks if passcode is set to 0 (invalid value hint)
functions.behavior: Returns true if passcode == 0, indicating device uses MTop and passcode cannot be used for secure channel

functions.name: expand_fallback_url_with_parameters
functions.description: Expands CommissioningFallbackUrl with MTop/MTcu parameters like custom flow URL
functions.behavior: Same expansion algorithm as expand_custom_flow_url, substitutes placeholders with URL-encoded values

functions.name: redirect_to_maintenance_url
functions.description: Administrator redirects user to EnhancedSetupFlowMaintenanceUrl for issue resolution
functions.behavior: Opens maintenance URL when encountering TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS_CHANGED status or TC issues

functions.name: start_background_scan
functions.description: Commissioner starts background scanning for device while custom flow in progress
functions.behavior: Initiates parallel BLE/WiFi scan to opportunistically discover device during manufacturer flow

functions.name: stop_background_scan
functions.description: Commissioner stops background scanning
functions.behavior: Terminates background scan when device discovered or custom flow completes

functions.name: detect_offline_mode
functions.description: Detects if commissioner has no internet access
functions.behavior: Returns true if internet unavailable, affecting DCL retrieval and URL-based flows

functions.name: proceed_offline_commissioning
functions.description: Commissioner proceeds with offline commissioning for compatible flows
functions.behavior: Continues commissioning without DCL/internet for Standard or User-Intent flows

functions.name: inform_internet_required
functions.description: Commissioner informs user internet access required for this device
functions.behavior: Displays message that custom flow or ESF requires internet connectivity

functions.name: skip_ble_discovery
functions.description: Commissioner skips BLE discovery when device already on IP network
functions.behavior: Bypasses advertisement scanning, proceeds directly to IP-based commissioning

functions.name: commission_via_ip
functions.description: Commissioner commissions device already on IP network without BLE
functions.behavior: Establishes secure channel via IP network connection instead of BLE discovery

functions.name: reset_error_state
functions.description: Commissioner resets error state before retry attempt
functions.behavior: Clears failure flags and error codes to prepare for retry

functions.name: attempt_commission_again
functions.description: Commissioner retries commissioning after transient failure
functions.behavior: Re-initiates commissioning sequence after determining failure was transient

functions.name: log_manufacturer_flow_failure
functions.description: Logs that manufacturer custom flow failed to make device commissionable
functions.behavior: Records that callback received but MTrop placeholder not replaced, indicating manufacturer flow failure

definitions.name: FlowType
definitions.description: Type of commissioning flow device implements

definitions.name: OnboardingPayload
definitions.description: Data contained in QR code or manual pairing code for device commissioning

definitions.name: DCLEntry
definitions.description: Device metadata entry from Distributed Compliance Ledger

definitions.name: ESFFile
definitions.description: Enhanced Setup Flow Terms & Conditions file in JSON format, UTF-8 encoded

definitions.name: CountryEntry
definitions.description: Per-country TC entries with language fallback

definitions.name: TC_Text
definitions.description: Individual Terms & Conditions text with metadata. HTML tags restricted to: title: , text:

definitions.name: TCCacheResult
definitions.description: Result of TC cache lookup including reuse eligibility per ESF option bits

definitions.name: FailureType
definitions.description: Type of commissioning failure: TRANSIENT=temporary network/timing issue, SYSTEMATIC=capability mismatch or incompatibility

definitions.name: EnhancedSetupFlowOptions
definitions.description: Bitmap indicating ESF features and TC caching rules

security_properties.description: Custom Flow bits in onboarding payload SHALL match CommissioningCustomFlow in DCL and actual device behavior
security_properties.violation_impact: Mismatch causes commissioner to follow wrong flow, skipping required security steps or failing commissioning

security_properties.description: User-Intent Flow devices SHALL NOT advertise automatically on power-on, requiring explicit user interaction
security_properties.violation_impact: Auto-advertising enables attacker to commission device immediately upon power-on without user awareness

security_properties.description: Custom Flow devices SHALL NOT be commissionable until manufacturer-guided setup completed
security_properties.violation_impact: Bypassing manufacturer setup skips required security configuration, ToS acceptance, or account binding

security_properties.property: Passcode confidentiality in Custom Flow URLs
security_properties.description: When MTop key present in CommissioningCustomFlowUrl, passcode SHALL NOT be usable for secure channel establishment
security_properties.violation_impact: Exposing real passcode to manufacturer server via URL leaks proof-of-possession credential to third party

security_properties.description: Commissioner SHALL validate ESF TC file using digest, filesize, and format before using; fallback to Custom Flow on validation failure
security_properties.formal: use_esf_file => (digest_valid AND filesize_valid AND format_valid) OR fallback_to_custom_flow
security_properties.violation_impact: Using unvalidated ESF file allows attacker to inject malicious TC with phishing links or XSS

security_properties.description: Commissioner SHALL end commissioning if user declines any required TC text
security_properties.formal: exists TC: (TC.required == true AND user_declined(TC)) => end_commissioning
security_properties.violation_impact: Commissioning without required TC violates manufacturer's legal requirements and device security policies

security_properties.description: TC responses SHALL NOT be cached or reused across different VIDs
security_properties.violation_impact: Reusing TC across vendors applies wrong manufacturer's terms, creating legal confusion and invalid consent

security_properties.description: TC responses SHALL NOT be cached when TC digest or revision changed
security_properties.formal: (cached_TC.digest != current_TC.digest OR cached_TC.revision != current_TC.revision) => NOT use_cached_TC
security_properties.violation_impact: Reusing stale TC responses applies old consent to new terms, violating fresh informed consent requirement

security_properties.description: Onboarding payload returned via MTrop SHALL have Custom Flow bits set to 0, not 2
security_properties.violation_impact: Returned payload indicating Custom Flow causes infinite redirect loop instead of commissioning

security_properties.description: Device SHALL stop advertising after timeout (typically 15 minutes) unless commissioned
security_properties.violation_impact: Unlimited advertising window extends attack surface indefinitely, allowing unlimited commissioning attempts

security_properties.description: Each bit in TCAcknowledgements bitmap SHALL maintain same purpose across device firmware versions
security_properties.formal: forall version: ordinal_purpose(bit, version) == ordinal_purpose(bit, version+1)
security_properties.violation_impact: Changing bit meanings causes misinterpretation of consent; old acceptance incorrectly applied to new features

security_properties.description: Device with TC update pending SHALL return TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS_CHANGED status for restricted interactions
security_properties.violation_impact: Without proper status code, administrator cannot diagnose TC-related limitations, prolonging degraded service

security_properties.description: TC title and text fields SHALL only use specified restricted HTML tag subset, no other tags allowed
security_properties.formal: forall tag IN (TC.title UNION TC.text): tag IN allowed_tags
security_properties.violation_impact: Unrestricted HTML enables XSS, phishing, malicious scripts compromising commissioner and user

security_properties.description: Secure channel establishment SHALL require valid pairing code proving physical device access
security_properties.violation_impact: Without proper proof-of-possession, remote attacker can commission device without physical access

security_properties.description: Commissioner SHALL retrieve DCL from trusted, authenticated source with integrity protection
security_properties.violation_impact: Compromised DCL allows attacker to poison commissioning metadata, redirecting to phishing sites

security_properties.description: All commissioning URLs (Custom Flow, Fallback, ESF TC) SHALL use HTTPS scheme, not HTTP
security_properties.formal: forall url IN (CommissioningCustomFlowUrl UNION CommissioningFallbackUrl UNION EnhancedSetupFlowTCUrl): url.scheme == 'https'
security_properties.violation_impact: HTTP URLs enable MitM attacks, credential theft, and malicious content injection

security_properties.description: Manufacturers SHALL NOT include MT-prefixed query keys not referenced by spec
security_properties.formal: forall key IN url.query_params: (key.startsWith('MT') => key IN {MTcu, MTop, MTrop})
security_properties.violation_impact: Using unreserved MT-prefixed keys causes future spec conflicts and unpredictable behavior

security_properties.description: URL query parameter order SHALL be preserved during expansion and handling
security_properties.violation_impact: Order changes may break manufacturer signature verification or deterministic processing

security_properties.description: URL fragment field SHALL remain unchanged during URL expansion
security_properties.violation_impact: Fragment modification may break deep linking or manufacturer-specific URL handling

security_properties.description: When passcode is 0 and MTop present, commissioner SHALL NOT attempt commissioning
security_properties.violation_impact: Attempting commission with invalid passcode wastes time and may leak device information

security_properties.description: Commissioner SHALL validate ESF schemaVersion compatibility before processing
security_properties.violation_impact: Processing incompatible schema may cause parsing errors, crashes, or incorrect TC handling

security_properties.description: Background scanning SHALL NOT interfere with ongoing commissioning or introduce race conditions
security_properties.violation_impact: Race conditions may cause double commissioning attempts or state corruption

security_properties.description: Fallback URL parameter expansion SHALL follow same security rules as custom flow URL
security_properties.violation_impact: Weaker fallback URL security enables same attacks as custom flow URL vulnerabilities

security_properties.description: Offline commissioning SHALL only proceed for Standard/User-Intent flows, not Custom/ESF requiring internet
security_properties.formal: offline_mode AND commissioning_allowed => (flow_type == STANDARD OR flow_type == USER_INTENT)
security_properties.violation_impact: Offline commissioning of Custom Flow devices bypasses required manufacturer security setup

security_properties.description: Manufacturer flow SHALL NOT replace MTrop placeholder if device not made commissionable
security_properties.violation_impact: Replacing MTrop on failure causes commissioner to attempt commissioning of non-ready device

security_properties.description: Commissioner SHALL distinguish transient failures (retryable) from systematic failures (fallback required)
security_properties.formal: commissioning_failed => (failure_type == TRANSIENT AND retry) OR (failure_type == SYSTEMATIC AND fallback)
security_properties.violation_impact: Incorrect classification causes endless retries or premature fallback abandonment

security_properties.description: Commissioning via IP network SHALL maintain same security properties as BLE commissioning
security_properties.violation_impact: Weaker IP commissioning security enables network-based attacks bypassing BLE proximity

security_properties.description: ESF TC file size SHALL match EnhancedSetupFlowTCFileSize exactly
security_properties.violation_impact: Size mismatch indicates tampering, truncation, or corruption of TC file

fsm_model.initial_state: Device state: S1/S2/S3 (depends on manufacturer flow selection), Commissioner state: C1, Administrator state: A1

cryptographic_operations.description: Commissioner and device perform PAKE to establish secure channel using pairing code as proof-of-possession
security_assumptions: Pairing code has sufficient entropy (not default/weak)
Pairing code requires physical device access
PAKE implementation secure against offline dictionary attacks

cryptographic_operations.algorithm: Cryptographic hash (SHA-256 or specified in DCL)
cryptographic_operations.description: Commissioner computes hash of ESF TC file and compares to EnhancedSetupFlowTCDigest from DCL
security_assumptions: HTTPS used for ESF file download

cryptographic_operations.algorithm: Platform-specific secure storage (e.g., AES-GCM with platform key)
cryptographic_operations.description: Commissioner encrypts cached TC responses for secure storage
Commissioner generates unguessable token for CallbackUrl authentication

security_assumptions.assumption: Physical access required for pairing code
security_assumptions.description: Pairing codes (QR or manual) are only accessible with physical device/packaging access
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: Remote commissioning attacks possible without physical presence

security_assumptions.description: Distributed Compliance Ledger entries are cryptographically signed and verified
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: Attacker can poison DCL to redirect commissioning to phishing sites or inject malicious URLs

security_assumptions.description: Commissioner properly validates HTTPS certificates for all URLs (Custom Flow, Fallback, ESF TC)
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: MitM attacks on commissioning URLs enable credential theft and malicious content injection

security_assumptions.assumption: User can distinguish legitimate manufacturer sites
security_assumptions.description: Users can identify legitimate manufacturer websites/apps vs phishing attempts
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: Users vulnerable to phishing when redirected to Custom Flow URLs

security_assumptions.description: Commissioner properly sanitizes restricted HTML in TC texts before rendering
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: XSS attacks via malicious ESF TC files even with restricted HTML tags

security_assumptions.description: Manufacturer servers hosting Custom Flow and ESF TC files are secure and not compromised
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: Compromised servers can serve phishing content, harvest credentials, or inject malicious TC

security_assumptions.description: Commissioner has access to platform secure storage for TC cache with encryption and integrity
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: Cached TC responses can be read or tampered with by attacker with file system access

security_assumptions.description: Device enforces advertising timeout (e.g., 15 minutes) independent of network conditions
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: Attacker maintaining network isolation enables indefinite advertising, extended brute-force window

security_assumptions.description: User intent signals (button press, etc.) cannot be remotely triggered
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: Attacker can remotely trigger commissioning mode on User-Intent devices

security_assumptions.description: Pairing codes have sufficient entropy to prevent brute-force within advertising window
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: Fast network attacker can brute-force pairing code during 15-minute window

security_assumptions.description: Device clocks sufficiently accurate for TCUpdateDeadline enforcement
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: Deadline enforcement unreliable; devices may prematurely disable or ignore expired deadlines

security_assumptions.description: Users commissioning Custom Flow devices have internet access to reach manufacturer URLs
security_assumptions.impact_if_violated: Custom Flow devices uncommissionable in offline environments
